text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, I go to the shopping district to pick
up some things and encounter Nice Nature
chatting with a shopkeeper.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home after helping me out with some
shopping, she talks sincerely about how the
people in the shopping district cheer her on and
motivate her to keep going.
